title: Amtech L3260 25 Piece Power bit Set
features: DURABLE: This power bit set is manufactured from chrome vanadium steel
VERSATILE: It includes a handy selection of Pozi, Philips, slotted, Torx and hex bits in a handy bit holder with a belt clip for easy access
ERGONOMIC USE: Built for comfort and ease of handling during long sessions
COMPACT FORMAT: Conveniently sized for storage in toolboxes and cabinets
TRADE READY: Suitable for both home users and professional tradespeople
description: Product Description Am-Tech DIY and tool products come with a 36 month assurance and are built for the rigors of the typical English home owner and the DIY jobs expected. The range includes a comprehensive range of hand tools for every job. Am-Tech also offer a range of power tools that not only provide a reliable level of service, but also look great as a present or gift in colour boxes and double blister displays. Am-Tech also offers a range of innovatively designed security products ranging from Dummy cameras to siren sounding locks.
